title: vitis simplex
intro: Vitis simplex, also known as the wild grapevine, is a plant species within the Vitaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vitis simplex include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Vitis simplex can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
